name: my-claude-plugins
description: Team plugin marketplace for Claude Code extensions

metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for team use

plugins.name: ripvec
plugins.description: Semantic code + document search. Model2Vec static bi-encoder (potion-base-32M) + TinyBERT-L-2 cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 21 tree-sitter grammars, 26 extensions, MCP + LSP server. 4.0.1: token_budget allocation for get_repo_map — PageRank-proportional byte budget (40% cap per file, logarithmic attenuation cutoff), RepoMapSymbol.rank, truncated_symbols/truncated_calls telemetry. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability — every tool returns lsp_location. Code: 42 ms p50; prose: 34 ms p50 with NDCG@10 = 1.000.

plugins.name: tracemeld
plugins.description: LLM-native performance profiling — import CPU profiles from any language (Rust, Go, Python, TypeScript, C/C++), find bottlenecks, detect waste patterns, and navigate to hot code via LSP. Includes 12 MCP tools, 6 language profiling skills, and a performance analysis agent.
